name: j-stark-invoicing
description: J-Stark Business Invoicing System - Mobile Optimized

scripts.deploy:github: git add . && git commit -m 'Deploy v4.0.0' && git push origin main
scripts.backup: node -e "console.log('Open browser console and run: StorageManager.downloadBackup()')"
scripts.clear-cache: node -e "console.log('Open browser console and run: CacheManager.forceUpdate()')"

author: J. Stark Business
